title: Fat Chicken
description: Christmas themed decoration and food mod
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4c392fef3a1366987298e180c3ed059d6471ebc.png)

### Fat Chickens

Feed your chickens berries to make them ready for christmas !  
Includes pigs, salmon and fish ! 

 

Once prepared and smoked, these food items can be eaten and/or placed down as decoration ! 

Apart from feeding animals fat and preparing them for a nice dinner. All meats from Fat Animals are best cooked in the smoker ! It's faster, gives more exp and more yield per coal.
  
You can also make decorative table cloth and a nice Ice Cream Log for desert!

Table Cloth recipe:  
![Table Cloth Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4e3781b43ab272b6a0f6a394491f89b822efb75.png)  

Ice Cream Log recipe:  
![Ice Cream Log Recipe ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/684d6f820a9e6893ffef3b5ce608d77d28a8308e.png)
 



_This mod has been made for the MMD 2021 winterjam !_
